title: podandriella batesii
intro: Podandriella batesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Podandriella batesii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
